summary: Contract Params Feature Testing Complete - All backend tests passed (11/11), Frontend UI verified working. Admin can customize contract parameters (corrispettivo, royalty %, durata mesi, rate) per partner via Admin Dashboard modal. Contract text dynamically renders with custom values.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/admin/partners/{partner_id}/contract-params correctly returns default params for partners without customization
PATCH /api/admin/partners/{partner_id}/contract-params correctly updates and persists contract params
PATCH endpoint correctly rejects updates when contract is already signed (returns 400)
GET /api/contract/text/{partner_id} correctly renders contract text with custom values after PATCH
ContractParamsModal in AdminPartnerTools.jsx correctly loads and displays params
Modal shows warning and disables fields when contract is already signed
Three-dot menu in PartnerRow correctly shows 'Personalizza Contratto' option
seed_data_creation: Partner 23 (Daniele Andolfi) used for testing - params restored to defaults after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contract params feature fully functional. Admin can customize corrispettivo, royalty_perc, durata_mesi, num_rate per partner. Contract text endpoint dynamically renders values. Modal correctly shows warning when contract is signed.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/contract/text/{partner_id}: ✅ Returns rendered contract text with custom values

frontend_ui.admin_dashboard_partner_table: ✅ Shows partner list with menu buttons
frontend_ui.modal_form_fields: ✅ All fields present: corrispettivo, corrispettivo_testo, royalty_perc, durata_mesi, num_rate, note_admin
frontend_ui.signed_contract_warning: ✅ Modal shows warning and disables fields when contract is signed

test_data_used.partner_23_daniele_andolfi: Not signed - used for update tests
test_data_used.partner_2_arianna_aceto: Used to verify signed contract restriction
